name: Cardrottini
short_description: Cardrottini is a chaotic Italian meme-fueled card battler where brainrot meets strategy. Build absurd decks, outwit your opponents, and embrace the madness. No context needed. If you know, you know.
detailed_description:
Cardrottini is a fast-paced, turn-based card battler powered by the most unhinged corners of Italian internet culture. From Tung Tung Tung Sahur to Ballerina Capuccina and Tralalero Tralala, every card is a tribute to the beautiful nonsense that clogs your feed at 2AM.

  • 🃏 Unlock Wild Cards: Progress through battles and challenges to unlock new cards featuring viral characters, chaotic catchphrases, and pure meme energy. Every unlocked card adds fresh madness to your deck and opens up new strategies.

  • ⚡ Merge for Ultimate Power: Take things further by merging cards! Combine your favorite memes to create supercharged versions with enhanced abilities. Experiment with fusions to discover the most ridiculous and powerful combos.

  • 🧠 Outplay or Outweird: Outsmart opponents with clever strategies - or just throw the weirdest combo possible and hope they tilt.

  • 🌍 Play With (or Against) Friends: Casual duels or competitive ranked matches, full of emotional damage and unexpected laughter.

  • 🔥 Regular Drops of Madness: New cards, seasonal events, and community-fueled chaos. The meta may not exist. That’s the point.

If you know, you know. If you don’t… you will.
